entry.title: two major news stations in a week?? Pinch me! (Like really hard so I forget about this ban for a minute ok??) Shoutout to my pal @sideofstef for slaying the first half of this CBS Interview!! *snaps* #tiktok #tiktokban #whimsysoul #sanfrancisco #bayarea

entry.title: What do you guys think about this secret treehouse Airbnb in the Santa Cruz mountains - would you stay here? 📍 Redwood Ridge Treefort in Felton ##airbnb##santacruz##felton##airbnbfinds##california##visitcalifornia##bayarea##sanjose##sanfrancisco##treehou

entry.title: Replying to @Robins_roost we listen and don't judge?? That treehouse Airbnb in Santa Cruz was one I will remember forever. We laugh about it now #santacruz #airbnb #felton #california #bayarea #sanjose #welistenanddontjudge #treehouse #whimsysoul

entry.title: Glow Up with me at San Francisco’s newest hydrafacial! @FACE FOUNDRIÉ San Francisco is on Chestnut and I’m obsessed with their bright, airy decor. We looked at all the gunk my esthetician pulled out of my face and 🤮 gross but satisfying, my skin is liter

entry.title: who was gonna tell me this is a vibe?! The DRAMA. The MUSIC. THE COSTUMES?!! Robin is a huge WWE fan boy and as a (very) early birthday present I got him tickets to Monday Night Raw last week in San Jose. I got floor tickets but didn't realize they were

entry.title: Posting spoilers without warnings a day after the book comes out is not nice. Remember when we asked people if they finished book 6 before we talked about dumble's demise? Bring that same courtesy here 😭 ##onyxstorm##booktok##spoilers
entry.content: Posting spoilers without warnings a day after the book comes out is not nice. Remember when we asked people if they finished book 6 before we talked about dumble's demise? Bring that same courtesy here 😭 ##onyxstorm##booktok##spoilers

entry.title: weirdest place in California 😵‍💫 Hidden down in Santa Cruz is the Mystery Spot, a super strange gravitational anomaly that only costs $10 to enter and experience yourself. You'll stand sideways on walls and at odd angles you should be able to. WARNING:
entry.content: weirdest place in California 😵‍💫 Hidden down in Santa Cruz is the Mystery Spot, a super strange gravitational anomaly that only costs $10 to enter and experience yourself. You'll stand sideways on walls and at odd angles you should be able to. WARNING:

entry.title: Buddist temple hidden in the California Redwoods?!🌲 Land of Medicine Buddha is serene and makes a fantastic morning hike / stroll while in the Santa Cruz area. There's plenty of Prayer Wheels to visit and turn for anything going on in your life, plus some
entry.content: Buddist temple hidden in the California Redwoods?!🌲 Land of Medicine Buddha is serene and makes a fantastic morning hike / stroll while in the Santa Cruz area. There's plenty of Prayer Wheels to visit and turn for anything going on in your life, plus some

entry.title: Dumplings and yap 💅🥟 Bay Area, you need to yap over all the tasty menu items at @Dough Zone !! There's a few locations around the Bay Area to visit. Top items to order: 🥟 pork wontons in hot & sour 🐮 pan fried beef pies 🥟 pork xiao long bao 🍜 yibin noo
entry.content: Dumplings and yap 💅🥟 Bay Area, you need to yap over all the tasty menu items at @Dough Zone !! There's a few locations around the Bay Area to visit. Top items to order: 🥟 pork wontons in hot & sour 🐮 pan fried beef pies 🥟 pork xiao long bao 🍜 yibin noo

entry.title: Secret treehouse in the California redwoods just 1.5 hours from San Francisco!! @Redwood Ridge Tree Fort is tucked away in the Santa Cruz mountains and makes for such a fun weekend getaway in the Bay Area. There's a kitchen, bathroom with a shower, fire
entry.content: Secret treehouse in the California redwoods just 1.5 hours from San Francisco!! @Redwood Ridge Tree Fort is tucked away in the Santa Cruz mountains and makes for such a fun weekend getaway in the Bay Area. There's a kitchen, bathroom with a shower, fire

entry.title: Name a better place for lunch!! Next time you're in the Santa Cruz area, head to downtown Capitola and grab a sunny table at Zelda's. It's especially a good stop for happy hour drinks and snacks while overlooking the ocean and those iconic colorful house
entry.content: Name a better place for lunch!! Next time you're in the Santa Cruz area, head to downtown Capitola and grab a sunny table at Zelda's. It's especially a good stop for happy hour drinks and snacks while overlooking the ocean and those iconic colorful house

entry.title: the drama?! the music? The costumes?! 💅 who was gonna tell me this is so awesome?! Just went to my first live WWE in San Jose a couple of weeks ago and I'm kinda hooked??? #wwe #wrestling #prowrestling #mondaynightraw #dragbrunch #dragshow #drag #queer #l

entry.title: Looking for the best burger in California? I found it. Hidden in Felton, an adorable mountain town in the Santa Cruz Mountains, is The Emerald Mallard. The interior has coolest decor, almost like a trendy hunting lodge with taxidermy, flowers and the bes

entry.title: Hiking up to Twin Peaks is always a WORK OUT but the views are amazing. Had so much fun meeting up with my friend @Hot Gay Nerd for this weekday hike. We stopped by Bernies in Noe Valley afterward for coffee and pastries. If you haven't done this urban h
entry.content: Hiking up to Twin Peaks is always a WORK OUT but the views are amazing. Had so much fun meeting up with my friend @Hot Gay Nerd for this weekday hike. We stopped by Bernies in Noe Valley afterward for coffee and pastries. If you haven't done this urban h

entry.title: the BEST spring activity in California ⬇️🌸 that so many skip. California's Central Valley is blooming soon! I love to head out to Central Valley each spring with the girls to catch these beautiful blooms and hit up a farm stand or two. Rodin Farms is my f

entry.title: Sac is SO gay 🌈💅 One of the best gift shops in the country is located right in Oak Pak in Sacramento so I had to check out @Strapping Store with my girls @Ashley + @genniferroseblog They have so many cute gifts in there but since my childhood nickname i

entry.title: If you're sick rn you need to buy this magic syrup!! Nin Jiom Pei Pa Koa herbal formula on Amazon. It's worth the buy from Amazon I promise it's magic and the only thing that saved my sore throat this week #peipakoa #coldremedies #fluremedy #coldandflusea
entry.content: If you're sick rn you need to buy this magic syrup!! Nin Jiom Pei Pa Koa herbal formula on Amazon. It's worth the buy from Amazon I promise it's magic and the only thing that saved my sore throat this week #peipakoa #coldremedies #fluremedy #coldandflusea

entry.title: Gay ice cream in the winter 💅 so happy Licked in Oak Park, Sacramento has vegan options for us dairy free girlies!! They're Queer owned and so dang tasty. Make sure to check them out, I'll be back (esp this summer!) @Ashley @genniferroseblog #lickedsacr
entry.content: Gay ice cream in the winter 💅 so happy Licked in Oak Park, Sacramento has vegan options for us dairy free girlies!! They're Queer owned and so dang tasty. Make sure to check them out, I'll be back (esp this summer!) @Ashley @genniferroseblog #lickedsacr

entry.title: what's making me go feral this month ⬇️ ✨ I caved and bought a thigh chain. I can't wait to wear it in Cabo in a few weeks! 💋@Saie has always been THAT girl for me when it comes to makeup, and I'm loving their Glowy Super Gel in their shade of "warm glow"

entry.title: 5 unique places in California ⬇️ Since this really is the best state and I could spend a lifetime just exploring it. 🐉 find 130 metal sculptures by artist Ricardo Breceda around the Borrego Springs desert. They're all free to visit! My favorite is the se
